rows.description: Computus Gu. Payster Rectoris a secunde die Novemb. 1708 ad eundem diem 1709.
rows.notes: Consensus on no amounts. gpt-5-mini's description text is more accurate visually, particularly 'Gu.', 'Payster', 'secunde', and 'Novemb.'.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput. de remanentib in Cista
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as an entry with amounts. claude-haiku misclassified it as a header and incorrectly associated the amount with an invented row 'Om lista'. Visual verification confirms £44 17s 10d. gpt-5-mini's detailed notes on pence ambiguity (interpreting as '10' from a smudge) align with visual reading.
Consensus on header with no amounts. Refined description to 'Arreagijs' based on clearer visual reading of the last letter.
Consensus on amounts and row type. claude-haiku's description 'Guineas' is more accurate visually than gpt-5-mini's 'Guineser'.

Both extractors agreed on whole amounts for £59 19s 9d. Visual inspection, however, confirms a clear 'ob' (half-penny) mark after the pence digit '9'. gpt-5-mini's description 'Longwitham' is more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Longwicham'. Overriding fraction based on visual verification.
Consensus on amounts and row type. gpt-5-mini's description 'pt' is more accurate visually than claude-haiku's 'p.'.
Full consensus on description, type, and amounts.
Consensus on amounts and row type. claude-haiku's description 'Cudlington Ry pro mich' is more accurate visually than gpt-5-mini's 'Luddington R?y pro mich'.

Amounts disagreed. Visual verification confirms £3 8s 8d. claude-haiku misread the pounds column as zero and shifted the shillings amount. claude-haiku's 'Ry' is slightly clearer for the description abbreviation.
Consensus on no amounts. Visual inspection confirms 'Chacehill & Sesquianno'. It is an entry, not a header as claude-haiku suggested, as it follows a pattern of named accounts.

Consensus on no amounts. Visual confirms 'Thrup'. Keeping as 'entry' as it follows a similar pattern to other named items without explicit amounts on the line. gpt-5-mini's transcription is more accurate.

Visual verification confirms amounts £0 2s 6d. claude-haiku incorrectly identified this as a header with no amounts. Refined description to 'Ralph marshall's capons' (from claude-haiku) as the apostrophe is visible.

Visual verification confirms amounts as £4 5s 3d 0.5. gpt-5-mini correctly identified pounds and shillings, but missed the half-penny fraction and was unsure about the pence digit (3 or 8). claude-haiku misread all numeric positions but correctly identified a fraction ('ob').

Visual verification confirms description 'Culcatt pro anno' and amounts £3 3s 3d. gpt-5-mini was largely correct except for 'Culcott'. claude-haiku invented a description ('Catcaft pro anno') and misread amounts, leading to its row being dropped.

Visual verification confirms description 'Luddington mills & mich' and amounts £2 12s 3d 0.5. gpt-5-mini's detailed notes on the pence/fraction ambiguity (interpreting '6' as '3' pence and a 0.5 fraction) are accurate. claude-haiku invented a description ('Cudlington mich & mich') and misread amounts, leading to its row being dropped.
Visual verification confirms no amounts for this line. gpt-5-mini is correct. claude-haiku incorrectly invented amounts for this row, leading to it being overridden by visual inspection.
Consensus on no amounts. gpt-5-mini's description 'quinquiesnio' is more accurate than claude-haiku's 'quincquennio'. Keeping as 'entry' consistent with other name entries.
Consensus on no amounts. gpt-5-mini's description 'Biennio' is more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Biennie'. Keeping as 'entry'.
Consensus on no amounts. gpt-5-mini's description 'Greenway' and 'Triennio' are more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Greeneway' and 'Triennie'. Keeping as 'entry'.
Visual verification confirms no amounts for this line. gpt-5-mini is correct. claude-haiku incorrectly invented all-zero amounts. The word appears to be 'anne' rather than 'anno'.
Full consensus on description, type, and amounts.
Visual verification confirms amounts £1 1s 0d. claude-haiku misread the pounds column as zero. gpt-5-mini's description 'Biennio' is more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Dissenio'.
Visual verification confirms no amounts for this line. gpt-5-mini is correct. claude-haiku incorrectly invented all-zero amounts. gpt-5-mini's description 'Moffineux' is more accurate.

Visual verification confirms amounts £4 18s 7d 0.75 fraction. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted pounds, shillings, and the whole pence digit '7', but identified the fraction as 0.5. claude-haiku's initial reading had a hard rule violation (18d) and its subsequent 'reinterpretation' was highly speculative, although it correctly identified 0.75 as a possible fraction type.

Visual verification confirms description and amounts £2 12s 10d. gpt-5-mini is accurate. claude-haiku invented a description ('Swithhell { Pepper pro sesquianno') and had a hard rule violation for pence (12d), leading to its row being dropped.

Visual verification confirms £6 7s 8d 0.75 fraction. gpt-5-mini extracted the correct whole numbers for pounds, shillings, and pence '8', but missed the fraction. claude-haiku misread pounds and shillings but did correctly identify the 0.75 fraction.

Visual verification confirms description 'Llifton Ferry & anno' (double 'll') and amounts £4 17s 2d. gpt-5-mini is accurate. claude-haiku had a hard rule violation for pence (17d) and significant reading errors.

Visual verification confirms description 'Densington & triennio' and amounts £10 1s 9d 0.75 fraction. gpt-5-mini extracted correct whole numbers and description. claude-haiku misread the description ('Bensington & trienno') and identified the fraction as 0.5 instead of 0.75.
Visual verification confirms description 'Brewheuse & anno' and amounts £8 3s 6d. gpt-5-mini extracted correct amounts. claude-haiku had significant reading errors and incorrectly added a fraction.
Consensus on no amounts. Visual confirms 'South newton Tenent & anno'. Keeping as 'entry' consistent with other name entries.
Consensus on no amounts. gpt-5-mini's description 'Trethevorn & sesqui anno' is more accurate visually than claude-haiku's 'Frehewm & sessqui anno'. Keeping as 'entry'.

Visual verification confirms no amounts for this line. gpt-5-mini is correct. claude-haiku incorrectly invented all-zero amounts. gpt-5-mini's description 'quadriennio' is more accurate than claude-haiku's 'guadyrennio'.
Visual verification confirms description 'Backgate Jennings' and amounts £4 0s 0d. gpt-5-mini is accurate. claude-haiku misread amounts and description ('Backgate denning').
Visual verification confirms amounts £5 0s 0d. gpt-5-mini is accurate. claude-haiku misread amounts and incorrectly added a fraction.
Visual verification confirms description 'Tue entrents & anno' and amounts £5 7s 2d. gpt-5-mini is accurate. claude-haiku had significant reading errors and incorrectly added a fraction.
Visual verification confirms description 'Warner & Biennio' and amounts £0 8s 0d. gpt-5-mini is accurate. claude-haiku misread the shillings amount as zero.

Visual verification confirms amounts £322 19s 9d. gpt-5-mini is accurate and correctly omitted description text for this total line. claude-haiku incorrectly added a 0.5 fraction and 'TOTAL' text; the mark after '9' is not a clear fraction.
